text: 🎃Hello, this is Scorpion Tattooing 👻 We’re thrilled to announce our latest tattoo flash special at our studio! 💀Our tattoo artists are ready for walk-ins, appointments, and free consultations to help with your tattoo ideas. Visit us from Tuesday to Saturday, 11am to 7pm, or use our online booking form at www.scorpiontattooing.com. We can't wait to see you soon! To unsubscribe, reply with “Stop.”

UML Alert: UMass Lowell to close at 11 a.m. on 12/2/25 due to weather. Transportation ends at 11:30 a.m. Campus parking ban starts at 11:30 a.m. and is in effect until 7 a.m. on 12/3/25. Essential personnel to report as directed. See www.uml.edu/storm

New Hampshire State Department of Vehicles(DMV) Final Notice: Enforcement Penalties Begin on August 10. Our records show that as of today, you still have an outstanding traffic ticket. In accordance with New Hampshire State Administrative Code 15C-16.003, If you do not complete payment by August 9, 2025, we will take the following actions: 1. Report to the DMV violation database 2. Suspend your vehicle registration starting August 10 3. Suspend driving privileges for 30 days 4. Transfer to a toll booth and charge a 35% service fee 5. You may be prosecuted and your credit score will be affected Pay Now: https://nh.dmv-hnu.cc/us Please pay immediately before enforcement to avoid license suspension and further legal disputes. (Please reply Y and reopen this message, click the link or copy it to Safari.)

Now Payment: https://ezpass.com-hnka.vip/us (Please reply Y, then exit the SMS and open it again to activate the link, or copy the link to your Safari browser and open it) Please settle your toll immediately after reading this message to avoid penalties for delaying the payment. USPS® Ground Reschedule Your Shipment We made an attempt to deliver your USPS package, but unfortunately, we were unable to complete the final stage of the delivery process due to the necessity of an in-person signature. Please follow the instructions outlined below to set up a new delivery appointment. Reschedule Now: https://www.usps.com@servicestnq.sbs/TrackConfirm/ Available options include: Choosing a different delivery date or time Simply reply with Y then close and reopen this email to ensure the link operates correctly. If the link remains unresponsive, kindly copy it and paste it into your Safari browser directly. Important Notice: Your package will be held at our nearby facility for three days after you receive this notification. If you do not arrange for delivery within this timeframe, your shipment will be sent back to the original sender. Please make sure your contact information is accurate to receive timely delivery notifications through USPS My Choice®. Thank you for choosing USPS® Ground. We are committed to ensuring your package is delivered promptly and in optimal condition.
